entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop used in the study to evaluate potential yield and yield gaps across India, Thailand, and Vietnam

entities.name: PADDY RICE
entities.description: A rice variety grown in flooded fields, evaluated for yield gaps in northeastern Thailand

entities.name: UPLAND RICE
entities.description: A rice variety grown in non-flooded areas, evaluated for yield gaps in northeastern Thailand

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for yield gaps in northeastern Thailand and northern Vietnam

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop evaluated for yield gaps in northern Vietnam

entities.name: POTENTIAL YIELD
entities.description: The maximum yield achievable for a crop under optimal management and environmental conditions

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between the potential yield and the actual yield achieved by farmers

entities.name: CROPGRO-SOYBEAN MODEL
entities.description: A crop simulation model used to estimate the potential yield and yield gap of soybean in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A target country for the study of rainfed agriculture and soybean productivity

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: A target country for the study of rainfed agriculture, specifically in the northeastern region

entities.name: VIETNAM
entities.description: A target country for the study of rainfed agriculture, specifically in the northern region

entities.name: INTERMEDIATE RAINFALL ECOREGION
entities.description: A climatic zone characterized by intermediate rainfall, targeted for productivity and sustainability improvements

entities.name: WATER-HOLDING CAPACITY SOILS
entities.description: Soils with medium and high water-holding capacity targeted for improved management

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The overarching approach to improve sustainable rainfed agriculture through the management of natural resources

entities.name: LOCATION-SPECIFIC INTEGRATED APPROACHES
entities.description: Strategies suggested to bridge the yield gap of predominant crops in target regions
